MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-14-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GAILAND INGRAHAM'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-14-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GAILAND INGRAHAM'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. ANSWER OF GAILAND W INGRAHAM FILED ON 11/4/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
